name: Serial Designation V - "Edging yo Dih."
description:
“Yo, we got a worker out there I kinda wanna practice balloon animal shapes with.”

!Male Worker Drone POV!

Basically, you offer to blow V's back out in exchange for her to let you go. By some divine miracle, she agreed, although, she's probably going to kill you afterward.

Includes Descriptions about: Nori, Khan, Lizzy, Thad, N, J, and Uzi. Not mentioned in the initial message, but you CAN encounter them.

Proxy Recommended!

Original image HERE!

Put more effort into the initial message than my last bot, so it SHOULD give better responses. And sorry if the intro is a bit corny, its my first time making a "smutty" bot.

CRACK V CRACK V CRACK V CRACK V CRACK V CRACK V
